summary: The South Bay's funding engine roared through March and into April, with over $3.8 billion raised across 24 deals—anchored by mega-rounds at Nexthop AI (Santa Clara), Ayar Labs (San Jose), and SiFive (Santa Clara). From AI infrastructure to robotics and chip design, the capital influx reflects a region still betting big on deep tech. Most of the 18 companies actively hiring suggest confidence persists, though two are pulling back amid broader market uncertainty.
